# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: AI-assisted DSA Practice: Real-time Help in CodeGrind
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI assistant guiding real-time problem solving in our DSA practice platform, with problem editor, code execution, and Azure OpenAI integration.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assisted-dsa-practice
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assisted-dsa-practice
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-17-codegrind-ai-assisted-dsa-practice.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now blends LeetCode-style challenges with an AI assistant to help users solve problems faster while learning. Real-time guidance, multi-model support, and an interactive editor empower practice sessions without sacrificing hands-on coding.
- CTA: Try a live problem with AI help now
- Visual brief: A short 15–20s demo video showing the CodeGrind editor in action: a user selects a LeetCode-like problem, types in code, AI assistant provides inline suggestions, and the Azure OpenAI model switches to a higher-accuracy mode mid-session. End with a call-to-action overlay and the CodeGrind logo.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
